Macros, functions, and constants for testing, memory management, resource handling, and metadata in firmware.

## Folders
- **[_test](_test/README.md)**: Defines macros for testing override functionality in the test infrastructure.
- **[applib](applib/README.md)**: Memory allocation and deallocation macros and functions for zero-initialized and standard allocation.
- **[kernel](kernel/README.md)**: Defines memory protection unit (MPU) region base addresses, sizes, and disabled subregions.
- **[process_management](process_management/README.md)**: Defines memory limits for SDK applications based on SDK version and platform.
- **[resources](resources/README.md)**: Enumerations and constants for resource and timeline IDs, and system resource versioning.
- **[services](services/README.md)**: Defines macros for app metadata with conditional color inclusion based on platform.
- **[shell](shell/README.md)**: Defines application IDs and a registry of system and resource apps with metadata functions.

## Files
- **[font_resource_keys.auto.h](font_resource_keys.auto.h.md)**: Defines font resource keys for various font styles and sizes in the Pebble firmware.
- **[git_version.auto.h](git_version.auto.h.md)**: Defines constants for Git version information used in test overrides.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Instructions for managing default header overrides in unit tests for the firmware.
- **[stdio.h](stdio.h.md)**: Overrides the standard `stdio.h` to include a custom `sniprintf` function for formatted output.
